kitchen.label: KITCHEN
kitchen.note: 2 walls on left side of kitchen entrance and 2 parallel interior walls to be removed for open kitchen

open_kitchen_walls_to_remove.description: Walls to remove for open kitchen design

entry_walls.location: Left side of kitchen entrance (when entering from dining/living area)
entry_walls.wall_1: Left segment of the wall between kitchen and dining (west side of opening)
entry_walls.wall_2: Outer left return wall at the kitchen entrance

parallel_interior_walls.location: Inside kitchen, parallel to the entry walls
parallel_interior_walls.wall_3: Interior west wall segment inside kitchen parallel to entry wall 1
parallel_interior_walls.wall_4: Interior partition wall inside kitchen parallel to entry wall 2
